name: Shadowgate VR: The Mines of Mythrok

reviews.review_description:
This truly is an immersive dungeon experience. The team nailed this for sure. Everything from music, sound effects, art, atmosphere just draws you in. 

I am still playing through. Finding items some times can be challenging due to the darkness of the dungeon but makes it realistic. 

Hopefully a 2nd one is underway.
I loved the original and spent hours on it,  but this has nothing to do with that game. No feels. :(

However I am stuck in the cave somewhere with the dragons and the disappearing path.  I have tried at least 20 times to get through that with no luck.  So I get frustrated and quit.  Is there some magic to get me through this level?

reviews.review_title: I love Shadowgate.. takes me back!
reviews.review_description: Just playing the NES game way back was enough to hook me into the world. But Shadowgate VR? This is the very thing that I believe having a VR headset is for. A total fantasy escape from reality into a fiction that could never exist in real life. In my opinion, this game was perfect. First and most important is atmosphere, and second is that it’s not just a gimmick they lean on.. you actually relate to the environment in the best way for me. By that I mean, it is a first person experience in a world, with advancement not being frustrating but just enough to stretch your thinking and keep you motivated wanting more. I come from the days of playing games that were so difficult they had you stumped for months, maybe years, so I understand there may be folk that really have trouble puzzling through this, and it may not be for everyone, but I really do feel this is not difficult, it’s just a great experience that makes me want book 2 right now! And I hope for book after book. I have quite a few games on my meta 3, and this is the very first one that I purchased, tried, and committed to finish all the way. I’m serious when I say that. From other reviews, I see the comparison to a game called red matter, and that alone has made me purchase those games as well, because this is my favorite play style outside of gettin together with buddy’s. I like a single player, escape to a place that I can explore and adventure through with progress being rewarding… and that reward is BOOK 2!!!! Bring it fast!!!

It's the first game that has scary part's that actually make me jump... Sound effects are creepy and the puzzles are challenging. I've not had any issues so far with any bugs in the software like some... I'm on a meta 2 and my firmware is fully updated.... Ive now reached the Indiana Jones cart and racing through the caverns .... 
Graphics are amazing and for me the graphics are streaming smoothly.... 
I've recommended this game to two friends.... Great game so far... Can't wait for the next one... 10/10
Steve

I am just getting started with this game and have probably played 2 hours.  The puzzles are difficult and I keep getting killed, but you slowly learn and make progress.  I wish I could save more often, but that’s the part that makes this game challenging.  Great game so far!  I also love the tips and Birds Eye view you get from the raven!

Seems like a cool game but I ran into a bug that might as well be a soft lock. I have to quit out of the game and restart it for a puzzle element to work. If I die while trying to solve the puzzle I can't just respawn. I have to restart the game entirely. Pretty annoying for a game that's all about solving puzzles when you don't know if you're missing something or if the game is just glitching out. Attempted to refund it but I guess I missed the window.

Why does no one mention this game in top Guest Game lists and reviews? This is the best game nobody has heard of. I bought it on a punt in the sale and it was a brilliant surprise. Great story, immersive, tricky puzzles, great beasts and fantastic characters. 

One question… when does part two come out?!
One of the best games in VR I think - part 2 please devs - played twice now and just as good 2nd time - nothing negative to say about this great action/puzzle adventure - immersive and fun

I just finished the game and absolutely loved it! Every evening I couldn't wait to get back to it. Totally immersive environment and captured my attention from the get go. There were times I was so engrossed by the game that whether a creature jumped out at me or if someone came into the room I would frequently scream out loud. I was so mesmerized by the game I often found myself continuing the adventure in my dreams. What a delight of a game. I'm sorry to see it end and really hope they do come out with the next chapter.

I LOVE this game. However it no longer works properly. Once I enter the main gate to start the game, it locks up and will not let me play. Additionally all my saved time and energy is just GONE…hours and hours of play. I tried to uninstall it and reinstall and that did not help. Money down the drain at this point on my favorite game in VR.
Great game, the puzzles are immersive and engaging and the visuals are beautiful.

developer_response.body: Hi, can you ping me at contact@zojoi.com and give me the details and I'll walk you though the steps to get it? Thanks! Dave

reviews.review_description: One of the best dungeon crawlers in VR.

reviews.review_title: Got stuck...but superb help from zojoi!
reviews.review_description:
The game is very fun and challenging. Rely on your sarcastic raven, or you can turn off the sarcasm, and you won't have a problem. However, if you do still have a problem, there are video walk through online that will help.
You need to look very carefully as the main character and the raven that sees things you can't. Save often. Shoot everything with your want as you may find items you'll need or spells that break when you shoot them.
Have fun!
Thank you, zojoi, for your quick and helpful assistance.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review, DarLava!

reviews.review_description:
The game is decent enough, but it focuses far too much on puzzles to make it truly fun for me. I can't progress for a second without having to solve another puzzle, which I just get bored of after a while, and I stopped playing as a result. I would much rather the core game was a dungeon crawling adventure with battles against creatures and then just the occasional puzzle for a bit of variety. I think, personally speaking, you have it the wrong way around. But the core game is solid, and I think there's still a lot of potential there. I hope you fully realise it at some point. Also, a wee upgrade to take advantage of Quest 3's power with say proper shadows on the enemies and stuff would be welcome.

Edit: Thanks for the response. Still, if you "padded" the game out with a bit more dungeon crawling and monster fighting in between the puzzles, the game would likely feel more like a classic sprawling action-fantasy adventure, and I think you'd hit the spot--for me at least. :)
 
--------------------------

Visit inceptional to get quarter off this and many other VR games.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review Inceptional! To be fair, Shadowgate has been an adventure/puzzle game first and foremost since I created it back in 1987 :)

reviews.review_description:
Edit!!!!….
Put on silly spider mode and now 5 stars!! Yey!! 
Thank you!!! 

Absolutely gutted as I love the gameplay and it definitely puts you in an amazing world but… I just can’t deal with the spiders!! Got to the cage and my nerves just can’t take anymore! The other beasts would have been no problem but the spiders have ruined it for me!  It’s not enjoyable so have had to stop the gameplay! Gutted!

developer_response.body: Hi, did you try the Silly Spider mode in the options? It changes the realistic spiders into goofy cartoon ones :)

reviews.review_description: Compared to other VR games this one is very basic. Graphics are not great and levels are small. Puzzles can be difficult but they don't take long to figure out as they are predictable. You bump into walls you clip into darkness and you can't duck to puck things up you have to bend over far. Not much physics in this game and you can only interact with things that are needed to progress further. Not much to mess around with and not much replay value. Kinda boring compared to other games in this category and I'm not feeling the shadowgate atmosphere like in nes.

developer_response.body: Hey Telex, sorry the game didn't meet your expectations.

reviews.review_description: I love this one.  The graphics are good, puzzles workable but challenging, and interactive.  Graphics are good, moving is smooth and responsive.  This is a great game!  But now that I have finished, the ending is very disappointing and anticlimactic.  Looking forward to the “… to be continued,” which I assume will be Beyond Shadowgate…and I hope it is released soon.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review Scorpio!!!

reviews.review_description: Don't work give me back my money

developer_response.body: Hey Cookieswag, what didn't work for you? Let us know so we can help out!

reviews.review_description:
Along with Moss, this is my favorite Occulus game.  The game was fun, i liked that i could ask for hints.    I got stuck at the dragon for a long time but finally got past it today.    I’m ready for the sequel!  

ps.  other recommendations for currently available games for prople who like this and Moss?

developer_response.body: Thanks Striper! Glad you liked the game! As for suggestions, I am a huge fan of the Vader Immortal series (and the lightsaber dojo is sweet!). I also like the other Star Wars Galaxy's Edge adventures. Super fun!

reviews.review_description:
I am disabled so I have to use the sitting option, but this game makes it impossible to reach the chests on the floor unless you adjust your height to be about 12 inches tall, in the settings.  This game is one of the reasons I bought the Quest and feel on the verge of tears right now.  Even in the virtual world, I'm too disabled to do anything.  Thanks.   Also, I am Non-Binary and resent the fact I have to pick Male or Female at the beginning, especially during the month of Pride.  
Update: I have been able to pick things off the ground, but it takes awhile to get the item to select, it doesn't work as well as you think.  I also had to adjust my height manually so I could pick up coins, because I couldn't get them to highlight.  The spike bridge in the game took me 30 minutes to pass, with ALL accessibily optoins on.  I figured out the puzzle immeaditely, but having to switch between the two inventories is really badly designed.  My wand and shield which are used often are on my belt where I can barely reach them.  And the inventory items that you can only use once are in an easily selectable place in front me.  Why not give the option to have all your inventory in one place.  How was that overlooked?  So switching between ruins and my sheild became impossible to do fast enough to not get one shotted by the enemies.  I can play Dark Souls games, but on easy with all accessibily option your game is insanely frustrating.  The puzzles aren't good either.  The spider puzzle with the pipes, I solved in my head in 10 seconds but it took me FOREVER to have to wait for the spiders to move to where I could hit them.  Shadowgate on NES was one of my favorite games.  This doesn't even come close.  Even if everything worked properly this is a sad pale clone to any other shadowgate game.  Do you like exploring boring repetative dungeons that use only 3 textures, than this is the game for you.  Also, I'm not emailing your company.  I'm not gonna be an unpaid tester for you.

developer_response.body:
Bobby,

Man, we're sorry the game didn't meet your expectations. We've def worked hard on making the game a fun experience for both standing and seated players. We'll be sure to go through your comments and see if there are ways to improve the game! :)

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game!  It is much like Tomb Raider in that each puzzle has to be solved to continue to the next.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much Xmas! We def appreciate the love!

reviews.review_description: Visually stunning spell effects and challenging puzzles. Make sure to save everything you do no matter how minute your progression because something is always waiting for you around the corner to take you out.

developer_response.body: Thank so much for the great review, Demonic!

reviews.review_title: Shadowgate VR: OG devs at their finest!
reviews.review_description:
(Thank you @ Devs/Mods)

TLDR: A modern take of Shadowgate in VR that maintains its' traditions while incorporating a new game style and genre. Overall it's extremely fun and well done.

Longer Review:
17 segments, 14 rooms, minecart rides before and after room 7 and Odin, your cheerfully sassy companion, one I enjoyed very much.
Length: 5-8 hours/0.5-1 hour to Ironman.

Cannot wait for Book 2!
Here is hoping there is an option to play them both consecutively (if both installed) and seamlessly!

What I'd love to see:
- Harder puzzles on higher difficulties.
- Ironman being different enemy placement/puzzles.
- RNG puzzle solutions?

Amazing game! Do not value it based on length or nostalgia but on the experience :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for all the kind words, Thothe! Glad you are digging it!

reviews.review_description: I just want to say that I enjoyed this game! By far this is my favorite 😍 ❤️.  I loved odins sarcasm and that I could interact with him!! However I want to play the next chapter!! I am absolutely 💯 percent in love with the fact that I get to have a dragon. I have been waiting on a game where I can have a dragon as my companion!! When is the second chapter coming!????????😍😍😍

developer_response.body: Thanks Stephanie for the great review! We're actively working on the new game what will come out next year :)

reviews.review_description: This is a really great game. Unfortunately I don’t do good with the jump scares and the stupid Wraiths make my anxiety go straight to 10 lol. The graphics are really great and the puzzles jeep me interested. I’m going to have to find my teenager to play through the scary parts for me😂😂

developer_response.body: Hey Wynter! Thanks for the great review! We're glad you're digging it (wraiths aside) :)

reviews.review_description: I am currently stuck In the 2nd mine cart and have not been able to pass it yet, with spiders in the rear and dragons in front shifting tracks and opening gates its a handful, I love it

developer_response.body: Thanks Mr! Glad yer digging the game! Remember that you can change the difficulty settings at any time :)

reviews.review_title: Still waiting for the download finally
reviews.review_description:
3 days and counting. No download and after sitting waiting with my headset on to make sure it did t time out - no more than .
73.3 mg. Waste of my fay and playing time. All other games did go e. Really disappointed. 
UPDATE:  Ty for your feedback. It has 120 g open. I downloaded it from my phone???  How crazy but I LOVE the game. I was struggling to find a non shoot / zombie/ blood and guts game that was like MOSS.  This game make la me think and a story too. I hope more to come.  I have watched my son be a gamer since 3 - and I was the spectator-  now I’m all in !!  Ty

developer_response.body: Hi Lori. We haven’t had any issues downloading the game. Here’s a few things to try: Do you have enough space on your headset? If so, uninstall another game. Have you tried powering down and restarting your Quest? It could be a simple memory issue. This is the most likely culprit. Email us at contact@zojoi.com and we can help you out!

reviews.review_description:
I must confess,i know nothing of shadowgate,but after watching the demo video in oculus store a good 3 or 4 times,i put it on my wish list in the hope it may get put on offer,and it did!
  This is my 2nd walky roundy type game for oculus,and i must admit it's pretty darn good.very atmospheric,looks great and plays well,i've not gotten to far into it yet,(i need to learn to slow down and actually learn how to play these games properly!)but so far,i'm really enjoying it,and can't wait to get further in.
  If you're unsure about buying this game,it might be worth seeing if any friends or family have got it,and having a go yourself.

UPDATE.....strangely,the game has started to give me a little bit of motion sickness,BUT....i bought some motion sickness wrist bands a few years ago (my teenage son wanted to go on some awful rides at the fair!)....problem solved,gonna try with some of my other games now.

developer_response.body: Hey Timmy! We are very glad you’re digging the game!!!

reviews.review_description: We need a dungeon game that lets u explore. This game is 100% linear.

developer_response.body: Hey Ochre. Shadowgate is historically a fantasy adventure game where each room is different and offers unique puzzles rather than a procedurally generated dungeon that is more rpg.

reviews.review_description:
Update:
After having finished the game I wanted to provide an update. This is truly a fantastically fun experience. It differs from most other Quest games in that it is not procedurally generated, but rather each area has been cleverly designed, and you can tell. It feels a little like a Dungeons and Dragons adventure, as you go further into the Mines of Mythrok to explore, encountering traps, puzzles and monsters. You feel so immersed and intrigued in the dungeon. Let's walk down this corridor, wait a min. Peek around the left corner, peak to the right. Hmm something feels amiss here. Look up.. Spikes! wow there's a raised stone on the floor. Better creep around that. How wonderfully fun and immersive. There are some really awesome moments that make you stop and really look around. I think as I have gotten older I have become somewhat jaded with gaming. In many ways most things I play now I am more trying to recreate that feeling of excitement I had as a kid. This had bought out that feeling in me. I genuinely had a huge smile on my face while playing this. During the mine cart sequence my wife came into the room to see what all the noise was (as I was yelling and whooping like a little kid) and I had to replay the section again casting to the TV to show her how cool it was. I think it's immersive adventurous games like this that VR is really made for. It's what we have been working towards for years. Thank you to the developers for creating this. It's a gem and very much one of my favorite games/experiences I can remember playing. 10/10

Original review:
This reminds me of being a kid and watching Knightmare on British tv. 30 years later and I'm finally living the dream of being inside a dungeon, solving puzzles and battling monsters. Very immersive and well made game. A true old school dungeon crawl brought to life in VR. Absolutely recommended. Please support devs like this who are giving us more than just another VR shooter. We need more of this.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review! We are thrilled you liked it and hope you also enjoy our future updates! :)

reviews.review_description: I recently bought the oculus and was just browsing on what games to buy, when I noticed this gem of game that I use to play with my older cousin on NES back in the day.  I purchased it without hesitation.  I hope they come out with another sequel to it. I love these type of games cause it make think and they’re fun at the same time.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much, AwesomeDude! We ARE working on the sequel :)

reviews.review_description: There are too many things I love about this game. I was never bored, and the challenges were cool. The only thing I didn’t like was when it was over! Can’t wait for the next one.

developer_response.body: Hey She-Schi! Thanks for the great review! We're working on the (much larger) sequel!

reviews.review_description: Very fun Game! I'm thrilled by the story,  still linear but graphics are great for VR.  This is my latest obsession 😍

developer_response.body: Thanks Mel for the awesome review!

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely LOVE this game. The graphics, the story, the gameplay and yes, even the mild shocks when you are confronted by a giant spider. Not quite finished it yet, but there will certainly be a gap when I'm done.

Are there any other similar games out there?

developer_response.body: Thanks TStirling! We're super happy that you are digging the game!

reviews.review_description: WOW...what am amazing game. Excellent graphics and a true VR game. Wish i had the room in my house to walk endlessly in this game but the joystick works also. Hope they come out with other chapters on this game. The Developers did a excellent job making a dungeons and dragons type game! Price is very fair considering the length and details here! Congrats once again!

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks JayVee for the great review and kind words. We're glad that the game met your expectations :)

reviews.review_description: There is a bug in the game. When I get close to the wall to climb down the stones, the screen will turn black, and I will fall and have to re-start.  It gets  annoying after the first 10 times of dying.... takes the fun out of playing it.

developer_response.body: Hi. Can you send us an email to contact@zojoi.com and let us know where you found a bug? Thanks!

reviews.review_description: My favorite VR game. Just started so I can’t speak to the complexity of the puzzles but super fun!

developer_response.body: Thanks Rat-luvs! We appreciate the love!

reviews.review_description:
I had to take a second glance to make sure I was reading the title properly, the original Shadow Gate is ancient but a game I have very fond memories of.

This is an excellent modern take on the series, if you're on the fence I'd say go for it.

developer_response.body: Thanks Cookie! We appreciate the love!

reviews.review_description: Not sure how you can know whether a game works for you or not, or find issues in less than 30mins. Most games it’s less than 2 hours to get a refund. Lots of annoying things don’t work and setting adjustments don’t seem to help, so I wanted a refund. And it looks like I have played it for more than 30 mins but under 2 hours , seems a little harsh to me.

developer_response.body: Hey Jacqueline, we definitely want to help. Can you let us know that things aren't working for you so we can make the game experience more enjoyable? Email us at contact@zojoi.com and we'll get it sorted!
